prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `833dafe3`.
codex_response:
`833dafe3` is a 2×2 mirror tiling: the input is copied into the bottom-right quadrant, its left-right mirror goes bottom-left, its top-bottom mirror goes top-right, and the top-left is the 180° rotation. I used the Opus summary as a starting hint because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no `833dafe3` entry. No new primitive was needed.

I implemented the task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_833dafe3/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_833dafe3/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_833dafe3/generator.py#L1). The generator now produces square, zero-background inputs with three foreground colors built from bar/rectangle fragments so the previews stay closer to the official family instead of looking like pixel noise.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the rebuilt preview sheet. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/833dafe3/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/833dafe3/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/833dafe3/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/833dafe3/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/833dafe3/previews/preview_03.png).
